title: Course: COSC 386 - Introduction to Quantum Computing
description: Introductory course covering quantum computing basics, quantum architecture, programming levels, quantum algorithms, and software development kits including Qiskit, Q#, Cirq, and Forest.
prerequisites_text: COSC 220 and MATH 312 completed with grades of C or higher
content:
COSC 386 - Introduction to Quantum Computing
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 220 and MATH 312 completed with grades of C or higher

Description: Introductory course covering quantum computing basics, quantum architecture, programming levels, quantum algorithms, and software development kits including Qiskit, Q#, Cirq, and Forest.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Computer Science: Group B
  - BS Cloud Computing: Group B

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=57279
